confirm.title: Configure {name}
confirm.description:
A Kohree lock was discovered:

**{name}** ({address})

Continue to import one-time Tuya cloud credentials via QR login. Runtime control stays local over BLE.

cloud_live.title: Tuya Live Auth
cloud_live.description:
Enter your Tuya User Code from Smart Life/Tuya. A one-time QR login will be generated for **{name}**.

{error}

scan.title: Scan Tuya Login QR
scan.description:
Scan this code in Smart Life/Tuya to authorize one-time credential import for **{name}**, then submit this step.

{error}

choose_cloud_device.title: Choose Cloud Device
choose_cloud_device.description: Multiple cloud devices were found. Choose the lock to import for **{name}**.

local.title: Local BLE Setup
local.description: Finalize local BLE connection settings for **{name}**. HA connects briefly each interval to read state and battery, then the lock sleeps.

error.cloud_auth_unavailable: Tuya cloud auth dependency is unavailable.
error.qr_code_error: Unable to generate Tuya login QR code.
error.login_error: Tuya cloud login failed. Confirm the QR code was scanned and approved.
error.no_cloud_devices: No Tuya cloud devices with local bootstrap keys were found.

abort.not_supported: This Bluetooth device does not match Kohree discovery rules.
abort.no_device: No discovery information is available for this flow.
abort.address_mismatch: The selected Bluetooth address does not match the discovered device.

init.title: Kohree Options
init.description: HA connects briefly each interval to read battery and state, then the lock sleeps. A shorter interval is fresher but lights the unit's connect LED and wakes its radio more often.
